frontmatter.title: 練習問題メモ 19（固有値と固有ベクトル その1－正方行列の定める線形変換の場合－）

children.value: \widetilde{W}(\lambda)=\left\{\boldsymbol{x} \in \mathbb{R}^n \mid \text { ある自然数 } k \text { に対して }(\lambda E-A)^k \boldsymbol{x}=\mathbf{0}\right\}
children.html: W~(λ)={x∈Rn∣ ある自然数 k に対して (λE−A)kx=0}\widetilde{W}(\lambda)=\left\{\boldsymbol{x} \in \mathbb{R}^n \mid \text { ある自然数 } k \text { に対して }(\lambda E-A)^k \boldsymbol{x}=\mathbf{0}\right\}W(λ)={x∈Rn∣ ある自然数 k に対して (λE−A)kx=0}

children.value: の部分空間であることを示せ。なお、

children.html: W~(λ)\widetilde{W}(\lambda)W(λ)
λ\lambdaλ
AAA

children.name: info
children.value:
あるベクトル空間$V$の部分集合$W$が以下を満たす場合に部分空間となる

1. $\mathbb{0} \in W$
2. $a, b \in W \implies a + b \in W$
3. $a\in W, c\in \mathbb{R} \implies ca \in W$

children.html: (λE−A)k0=0(\lambda E - A)^k 0 = 0(λE−A)k0=0
0∈Rn0 \in \mathbb{R}^n0∈Rn
0∈W~(λ)0 \in \widetilde{W}(\lambda)0∈W(λ)

children.value: 次の１～３の正方行列の固有値と固有値に対する 1 つの固有ベクトルおよび固有空間を求めよ。

children.html: λ\lambdaλ

det⁡(A−λE)=det⁡(1−λ122−λ)=(1−λ)(2−λ)−2=2−3λ+λ2−2=(λ−3)λ=0\begin{aligned} \det(A - \lambda E) &= \det \begin{pmatrix} 1 - \lambda & 1\\ 2 & 2 - \lambda \end{pmatrix}\\ &= (1 - \lambda)(2 - \lambda) - 2\\ &= 2 - 3\lambda + \lambda^2 - 2\\ &= (\lambda - 3) \lambda\\ &= 0 \end{aligned}det(A−λE)​=det(1−λ2​12−λ​)=(1−λ)(2−λ)−2=2−3λ+λ2−2=(λ−3)λ=0​
λ=0,3\lambda = 0, 3λ=0,3

V(3)={c(12)∣c∈R}V(3) = \left . \left\{ c \begin{pmatrix} 1 \\ 2 \end{pmatrix} \right | c\in \mathbb{R} \right\}V(3)={c(12​)∣∣​c∈R}
(120222023)\left(\begin{array}{lll}1 & 2 & 0 \\ 2 & 2 & 2 \\ 0 & 2 & 3\end{array}\right)⎝⎛​120​222​023​⎠⎞​

det⁡(A−λE)=det⁡(1−λ2022−λ2023−λ)=(1−λ)(2−λ)(3−λ)−4(1−λ)−4(3−λ)=(2−3λ+λ2)(3−λ)−4+4λ−12+4λ=(2−3λ+λ2)(3−λ)−16+8λ=6−9λ+3λ2−2λ+3λ2−λ3−16+8λ=−λ3+6λ2−3λ−10\begin{aligned} \det(A - \lambda E) &= \det \begin{pmatrix} 1-\lambda & 2 & 0 \\ 2 & 2-\lambda & 2 \\ 0 & 2 & 3-\lambda \end{pmatrix}\\ &= (1-\lambda) (2-\lambda) (3 - \lambda) - 4 (1-\lambda) - 4 (3 - \lambda)\\ &= (2 - 3 \lambda + \lambda^2) (3 - \lambda) - 4 + 4\lambda - 12 + 4\lambda\\ &= (2 - 3 \lambda + \lambda^2) (3 - \lambda) - 16 + 8\lambda\\ &= 6 - 9 \lambda + 3\lambda^2 - 2 \lambda + 3 \lambda^2 - \lambda^3 - 16 + 8\lambda\\ &= - \lambda^3 + 6\lambda^2 - 3 \lambda - 10 \\ \end{aligned}det(A−λE)​=det⎝⎛​1−λ20​22−λ2​023−λ​⎠⎞​=(1−λ)(2−λ)(3−λ)−4(1−λ)−4(3−λ)=(2−3λ+λ2)(3−λ)−4+4λ−12+4λ=(2−3λ+λ2)(3−λ)−16+8λ=6−9λ+3λ2−2λ+3λ2−λ3−16+8λ=−λ3+6λ2−3λ−10​
(λ−5)(λ−2)(λ+1)=0(\lambda - 5) (\lambda - 2) (\lambda + 1) = 0(λ−5)(λ−2)(λ+1)=0
λ=−1,2,5\lambda = -1, 2, 5λ=−1,2,5

children.value:
import sympy as sp

l = sp.Symbol("l")
M = sp.Matrix([
    [1-l, 2, 0],
    [2, 2-l, 2],
    [0, 2, 3-l],
])
det = M.det()
print(f"{det=}")

print(f"factor: {sp.factor(det)}")

from sympy.solvers import solve
print(f"λ={solve(det)}")

children.html: λ=−1\lambda = -1λ=−1

{2x1+2x2=02x1+3x2+2x3=02x2+4x3=0\begin{cases} 2 x_1 + 2 x_2 \quad\quad= 0\\ 2 x_1 + 3 x_2 + 2 x_3 = 0 \\ \quad\quad 2 x_2 + 4 x_3 = 0 \end{cases}⎩⎨⎧​2x1​+2x2​=02x1​+3x2​+2x3​=02x2​+4x3​=0​
x1=−x2x_1 = -x_2x1​=−x2​

children.value:
import sympy as sp

l = sp.Symbol("l")
M = sp.Matrix([
    [1-l, 2, 0],
    [2, 2-l, 2],
    [0, 2, 3-l],
])
print(M.eigenvals())
M.eigenvects()

children.html: (211121112)\left(\begin{array}{lll}2 & 1 & 1 \\ 1 & 2 & 1 \\ 1 & 1 & 2\end{array}\right)⎝⎛​211​121​112​⎠⎞​
det⁡(A−λE)=det⁡(2−λ1112−λ1112−λ)=0\det(A - \lambda E) = \det \begin{pmatrix} 2-\lambda & 1 & 1 \\ 1 & 2-\lambda & 1 \\ 1 & 1 & 2-\lambda \end{pmatrix} = 0det(A−λE)=det⎝⎛​2−λ11​12−λ1​112−λ​⎠⎞​=0

det⁡(A−λE)=det⁡(2−λ1112−λ1112−λ)=(2−λ)3+1+1−3(2−λ)=(2−λ)(2−λ)(2−λ)+2−6+3λ=(4−4λ+λ2)(2−λ)−4+3λ=8−4λ−8λ+4λ2+2λ2−λ3−4+3λ=−λ3+6λ2−12λ+3λ+8−4=−λ3+6λ2−9λ+4\begin{aligned} \det(A - \lambda E) &= \det \begin{pmatrix} 2-\lambda & 1 & 1 \\ 1 & 2-\lambda & 1 \\ 1 & 1 & 2-\lambda \end{pmatrix}\\ &= (2 - \lambda)^3 + 1 + 1 - 3 (2 - \lambda)\\ &= (2 - \lambda)(2 - \lambda)(2 - \lambda) + 2 - 6 + 3\lambda\\ &= (4 - 4 \lambda + \lambda^2)(2 - \lambda) -4 + 3\lambda\\ &= 8 - 4\lambda - 8 \lambda + 4\lambda^2 + 2\lambda^2 - \lambda^3 -4 + 3\lambda\\ &= -\lambda^3 + 6\lambda^2 - 12 \lambda + 3\lambda + 8 - 4\\ &= -\lambda^3 + 6\lambda^2 - 9 \lambda + 4\\ \end{aligned}det(A−λE)​=det⎝⎛​2−λ11​12−λ1​112−λ​⎠⎞​=(2−λ)3+1+1−3(2−λ)=(2−λ)(2−λ)(2−λ)+2−6+3λ=(4−4λ+λ2)(2−λ)−4+3λ=8−4λ−8λ+4λ2+2λ2−λ3−4+3λ=−λ3+6λ2−12λ+3λ+8−4=−λ3+6λ2−9λ+4​
f(λ)=−λ3+6λ2−9λ+4f(\lambda) = -\lambda^3 + 6\lambda^2 - 9 \lambda + 4f(λ)=−λ3+6λ2−9λ+4
λ=1\lambda =1λ=1
f(1)=−1+6−9+4=0f(1) = -1 + 6 -9 + 4 = 0f(1)=−1+6−9+4=0
(λ−1)(\lambda - 1)(λ−1)
f(λ)=(λ−1)×−(λ2−5λ+4)=−(λ−1)(λ−1)(λ−4)f(\lambda) = (\lambda - 1) \times -(\lambda^2 - 5\lambda + 4) = -(\lambda - 1)(\lambda - 1)(\lambda-4)f(λ)=(λ−1)×−(λ2−5λ+4)=−(λ−1)(λ−1)(λ−4)
λ=1,4\lambda = 1, 4λ=1,4

children.value:
import sympy as sp

l = sp.Symbol("l")
M = sp.Matrix([
    [2-l, 1, 1],
    [1, 2-l, 1],
    [1, 1, 2-l],
])
det = M.det()
print(f"{det=}")

print(f"factor: {sp.factor(det)}")

from sympy.solvers import solve
print(f"λ={solve(det)}")

children.html: A=(abcd)A=\left(\begin{array}{ll} a & b \\ c & d \end{array}\right)A=(ac​bd​)

children.value:
\begin{align}
\phi_A(\lambda)
&= \det(A - \lambda I)
= \det\left(\begin{array}{cc}
    a - \lambda & b \\
    c & d - \lambda
\end{array}\right)\\
&= (a - \lambda) (d - \lambda) - bc\\
&= ad - a \lambda - d \lambda + \lambda^2 - bc\\
&= \lambda^2 - (a + d) \lambda + (ad - bc)\\
\end{align}
children.html: ϕA(λ)=det⁡(A−λI)=det⁡(a−λbcd−λ)=(a−λ)(d−λ)−bc=ad−aλ−dλ+λ2−bc=λ2−(a+d)λ+(ad−bc)\begin{align} \phi_A(\lambda) &= \det(A - \lambda I) = \det\left(\begin{array}{cc} a - \lambda & b \\ c & d - \lambda \end{array}\right)\\ &= (a - \lambda) (d - \lambda) - bc\\ &= ad - a \lambda - d \lambda + \lambda^2 - bc\\ &= \lambda^2 - (a + d) \lambda + (ad - bc)\\ \end{align}ϕA​(λ)​=det(A−λI)=det(a−λc​bd−λ​)=(a−λ)(d−λ)−bc=ad−aλ−dλ+λ2−bc=λ2−(a+d)λ+(ad−bc)​​

children.value: 今回はケイリー・ハミルトンの定理における

children.html: A2−(a+d)A+(ad−bc)A^2 - (a + d) A + (ad - bc)A2−(a+d)A+(ad−bc)

A2−(a+d)A+(ad−bc)=A2−(13+23)A+(1323−1119)=A2−A+(29−119)=A2−A−1\begin{aligned} A^2 - (a + d) A + (ad - bc)\\ &= A^2 - (\frac{1}{3} + \frac{2}{3}) A + (\frac{1}{3}\frac{2}{3} - 11\frac{1}{9})\\ &= A^2 - A + (\frac{2}{9} - \frac{11}{9})\\ &= A^2 - A - 1\\ \end{aligned}A2−(a+d)A+(ad−bc)​=A2−(31​+32​)A+(31​32​−1191​)=A2−A+(92​−911​)=A2−A−1​

children.value: 問題文中の行列多項式を整理すると、ケイリー・ハミルトンの定理により

children.html: A2−A−I=0A^2-A-I=0A2−A−I=0

f(A)=A4−A3−A2+9A−1=A2(A2−A−I⏟=O)+9A−1=9A−1\begin{aligned} f(A) &=A^4-A^3-A^2+9 A-1\\ &=A^2(\underbrace{ A^2-A-I }_{=O}) + 9 A - 1\\ &= 9 A - 1\\ \end{aligned}f(A)​=A4−A3−A2+9A−1=A2(=OA2−A−I​​)+9A−1=9A−1​

f(A)=9A−E=9(13111923)−(1001)=(939999183)−(1001)=(39916)−(1001)=(29915)\begin{aligned} f(A) &= 9A - E\\ &= 9 \left(\begin{array}{cc} \frac{1}{3} & 11 \\ \frac{1}{9} & \frac{2}{3} \end{array}\right) - \left(\begin{array}{cc} 1 & 0\\ 0 & 1 \end{array}\right)\\ &= \left(\begin{array}{cc} \frac{9}{3} & 99 \\ \frac{9}{9} & \frac{18}{3} \end{array}\right) - \left(\begin{array}{cc} 1 & 0\\ 0 & 1 \end{array}\right)\\ &= \left(\begin{array}{cc} 3 & 99 \\ 1 & 6 \end{array}\right) - \left(\begin{array}{cc} 1 & 0\\ 0 & 1 \end{array}\right)\\ &= \left(\begin{array}{cc} 2 & 99 \\ 1 & 5 \end{array}\right) \end{aligned}f(A)​=9A−E=9(31​91​​1132​​)−(10​01​)=(39​99​​99318​​)−(10​01​)=(31​996​)−(10​01​)=(21​995​)​

children.value:
import sympy as sp

M = sp.Matrix([
    [1/3, 11],
    [1/9, 2/3],
])
I = sp.Matrix([
    [1, 0],
    [0, 1],
])

(M @ M @ M @ M) - (M @ M @ M) - (M @ M) + 9 * M - I
